role_confusion_cases.notes: ALE-151: production /chat surfaced Sales/BD roles at 0.855-0.860 above CHAT_SOURCE_MIN_SCORE while declining to claim a frontend match.

tech_stack_adversarial_cases.notes: ALE-145 / ADR-0010 Decision 5 / findings 0001 Case 1: Python-core role (Courseware Labs) must outrank PHP/Node role that only lists Python once (Mobile Studio).
ALE-145 / ADR-0010 Decision 5 / findings 0001 Case 2: Go-primary role (Fleet Finance) must outrank Python/Django role with no Go (Courseware Labs).

ALE-145 / ADR-0010 Decision 5 / findings 0001 Case 3: Terraform-as-requirement role (Courseware Labs) must outrank Senior Software Engineer with no Terraform/IaC (Wildlife Analytics). Keyword density favors expected so BM25/hybrid can reinforce it.
